input_contract.completed_modules_format: List or set of module_id values completed earlier in the same session.

activation_rules.general_modules: Always eligible once per session unless already completed.
activation_rules.conditional_modules_rule: Activate conditional modules by evaluating the activation_rules declared in each module file against session state and complaint context.

question_selection_within_module.ownership_source: Use module owned_fields when present; if absent, derive from the module questions list as a fallback.
question_selection_within_module.field_order_rule: Respect module field_order when selecting the next module question.
